subject: FW: Iain  Couzin
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: John Brockman [mailto:brockman@edge.org] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2008 1:11 PM
To: Jeffrey Epstein
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: Iain Couzin

JE,

1. Below is the contact info for Iain Couzin and the link to the NYTimes
article about him. Max told him to give you a call.

I've been looking for a speaker/topic to reprise the Napa event last
summer and "swarm" seems the most interesting to me. 

2. Here's the EDGE dinner at TED:
http://www.edge.org/documents/dinner2008/pages/page01.html

3. And here, if you didn't see it, is the Napa event (photos by Nathan):
http://www.edge.org/documents/kahneman_master/pages/Auberge-du-Soleil.ht
ml

JB

---
NEW YORK TIMES
November 13, 2008
>From Ants to People, an Instinct to Swarm
By Carl Zimmer 

http://www.nytimes.com/2007/11/13/science/13traff.html?_r=1&ref=science&
oref=slogin

Assistant Professor,
Department of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology 
Princeton, NJ 08540

609-258-8786 office
609-712-2003 mobile
icouzin@Princeton.edu

---
-- 
John Brockman
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Edge Foundation, Inc.	             brockman@edge.org
5 East 59th Street	             tel: 212.935.8900 x11
New York, NY 10022		     fax: 212.935.5535
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
